title: Big Digital Timer Stopwatch, Makeup Mirror Screen Large LED Display Visual Glowing Countdown Game Timer, Magnetic Magnet Timers for Teacher Classroom Kitchen Baking Cooking Fitness GYM Library (Pink)
features: Attentions: When the sun symbol appears in the upper left corner of the screen, it indicates that the ultra bright mode is turned on, we recommend that you turn it off unless you have special needs, as this will accelerate energy consumption. Large, clear mirror display screen: 4-inch LED display screen with bold numbers, even elderly people can observe timing very clearly from a few meters away. In addition, the unique constant luminous function allows you to use it in dark nights. When you are not timing, the screen will automatically dim to save power.

0~99mins 59secs Time management tools for various usage scenarios: The Rohome timer has 2 circular magnets behind it, a standing bracket, and a hole for hanging, which can be hung up, placed on a table, or magnetically attached to the refrigerator door. You can put it anywhere you want.

It is easy to carry: The Rohome timer is powered by three AAA (not included), which is convenient for you to carry and use when traveling. The operation is extremely simple and smooth. Press "ST/SP" to start the timer, and press "M" and "S" simultaneously to reset. You can also set a specific time to start the countdown.

Three level volume mode: high volume (80-90 decibels), low volume (60-75 decibels), and mute mode. In silent mode, the numbers will flash and the timer alarm will not disturb others. It can meet the needs of different scenarios such as kitchens, libraries, classrooms, meetings, naps, games, offices, etc.

Such a simple timer that even children and elderly people can easily make it work! Suitable for various venues, such as cooking, learning, fitness, games, tasks, meetings, classrooms, and other activities.
description: Product Description Rohome Large Display Mirror Led Timer A Timer Very Easy to Use for Your Familes, Especially for Kids, Olds. Flexible Placement Method It can be attached to the refrigerator door, hung on the wall, or standing on a table for easy placement. Easy Designed for Using Easy to use, labor-saving pressing, large numbers, and easy to use in just one minute. Free Adjustable Volume Selection Turn up the sound during nap, and you can also turn up the alarm when cooking in the kitchen. Of course, in the library, you can set it to silent mode. A timer that combines beauty and strength, excellent choice for time management. I ts design style is simple, beautiful, and elegant. When using, the operation is smooth and easy to master without the need for learning. You will be able to accurately manage your daily time and adjust your pace of life. The eco energy-saving mode can more conveniently serve different types of occasions, serving outdoor travelers, chefs, teachers, doctors, students, nurses, young children, horticultural irrigation and other industry groups. Memory function: When the timer countdown ends, press the ST/SP and return to the last set time. Specification: Material: Plastic Size: 11cm * 8cm * 3cm Brightness Range: Constant light mode/Marker mode/Off mode Volume Range: Silent (Mute) 0db/Normal 60db/Loud 90db Countup and Countdown Time Range: 0~99mins 59secs Powered by 3 * AAA (Not included)
